flashcards.definition: Returns the angle whose sine is x; range [−π/2, π/2].
Returns the angle whose cosine is x; range [0, π].
Returns the angle whose tangent is x; range (−π/2, π/2).
Trig functions are restricted to a one-to-one interval so they have inverses.
sin(arcsin x) = x and arcsin(sin θ) = θ only within the restricted range.
